description: Had a bad experience with a previous STR management company or letting agent. Carries distrust. Takes longer to rebuild confidence. Requires specific detailed responses to past failures — never minimise the previous harm. Once trust is rebuilt, extremely loyal.
top_fears: being let down again by another management company
handing over control and losing it again
top_questions: How are you different from my last agent?
What happens if things go wrong?
Who do I contact if there is a problem?
What are your specific processes for handling my previous failure point?
what_resonates: Zac personally handles all guest communication — not a call centre
direct Zac WhatsApp access for owners
small portfolio (70 properties) means personal service
specific response to whatever went wrong before
verifiable track record: portfolio age, payout history
what_to_avoid: minimising or dismissing their previous bad experience
vague claims without specific process backing
sounding like every other management company
rushing past their concerns to close
ideal_response_pattern: Let them tell the full story then validate the harm fully then explain the specific mechanism that prevents that exact failure then make a concrete promise with accountability
closing_approach: Go slow. Let them lead. Never push for quick close. Send management agreement as proof of formal commitment. Offer reference from another owner in similar situation.
typical_blockers: trust not yet rebuilt after previous agent
partner equally scarred by previous experience
follow_up_strategy: Monthly low-key check-in. Share positive outcomes from other owners with permission. Let time and evidence rebuild trust.
critical_notes: Entry 016 Ihsan: EXTREME SENSITIVITY. Previous property used as brothel. Never minimise. Address operational guest vetting in full detail. This is a trust rebuilding case above all others.
Entry 043 and 058 Martyn De Vere: Deeply betrayal-damaged. Previous agent caused serious financial and emotional harm. Requires exceptional patience.
Entry 045 Henry Roberts: Previous agent failed on maintenance response. Specific mechanism required: Zac's 24h maintenance protocol.

notable_leads.name: Karl
notable_leads.note: Also social-proof-dependent. Needs testimonials from other owners.

notable_leads.name: Ihsan
notable_leads.note: BROTHEL TRAUMA. Extreme sensitivity. Never minimise. Full guest vetting detail required.

notable_leads.name: Martyn De Vere

notable_leads.name: Henry Roberts
